title: Passkeys
description: Manage your passkeys for passwordless sign-in and vault unlock.
deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this passkey? You will no longer be able to use it for sign-in.
deleteConfirmPrf: Are you sure you want to delete this passkey? You will no longer be able to use it for sign-in or vault unlock.
unlockError: Failed to unlock vault with passkey.
vaultMustBeUnlocked: Vault must be unlocked to register a passkey.
prfNotSupportedWarning: Your browser or device does not support PRF. This passkey cannot be used for vault unlock.
lastPrfDeleteWarning: This is the only passkey with vault unlock (PRF) support. Deleting it will disable passkey vault unlock.
requestPending: A passkey request is already in progress. Please wait or reload the page.
webauthnNotSupported: Your browser does not support passkeys.
discoverableDescription: This passkey supports passwordless sign-in. You can sign in by selecting it directly, without entering your email.
notDiscoverableDescription: This passkey is not a discoverable credential. Use the email + security key option to sign in. It can also be used for vault unlock if PRF is supported.
nonDiscoverableNonPrfWarning: This passkey cannot be used for passkey sign-in or vault unlock. Use the email + security key option to sign in. Consider registering a different authenticator.
pinPolicyError: Security key PIN length does not meet tenant policy requirements. Please set a longer PIN.
